description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof with a sleek, minimalist facade dominated by dark exterior walls and large rectangular windows. The front includes a driveway leading to a carport, bordered by a small patch of green lawn and landscaped planters. The rear of the bungalow opens to a spacious patio area with outdoor seating and decorative plants, enclosed by a privacy fence. The structure is primarily rectangular, with clean lines and a combination of solid and glass surfaces. The windows are arranged in a vertical and horizontal pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall design emphasizes contemporary aesthetics with functional outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with dark walls, large windows, a driveway, and a rear patio with outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, carport, main entrance, and a glimpse of the rear patio.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated rectangular shape, flat roof, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spacious patio, outdoor seating, and privacy fence.
description_view_3: Side view with prominent window arrangement and a clear view of the driveway and carport.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large vertical and horizontal windows
